title: Pusheen GUI
body:
_Hi there!_

Welcome to this _brand new GUI_ I just made, that is **Pusheen**!

It's a little more detailed than the previous GUIs, so I hope you'll like it :) I changed the buttons corners to be round, as well as slots! The colors are simple but efficient, I think.

__________
The original pack is made for Java 1.21. If for some reasons, you need to use it to play with more recent versions of the game, you can dezip the file, open the "pack.mcmeta" document in a text editor and edit the number after "pack_format":.

For Java 1.21, it's 34. For Java 1.21.4, it's 46. (For the 25w02a snapshot, it is 47.)

You can find these informations on the minecraft wiki with this link.

Don't forget to save the changes and re-zip the file before putting it back in the resourcepacks folder!
__________


Let me know what you think about this one!

[You can also buy me a coffee here if you like what I do!](https://ko-fi.com/nonicraft)

Thanks a lot for downloading my creations, I hope you're doing well, and enjoy playing with my GUIs :)
